low_risk_equation.strength_term: A_low = mix(S_system_steady_score, R_system_steady, S_system_score, M_brain_direct_v24, R_train_v30)
low_risk_equation.learning_term: L_low = mix(L_system_steady, L_system, D_feature_v24, B_plastic_v30, R_train_v30)
low_risk_equation.system_term: M_low = A_low + S_low + R_low + L_low - P_low

project_readout.summary: low-risk steady amplification validation checks whether systemic steady amplification starts moving into a lower-risk regime.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this lower-risk trend persists when pushed into larger, longer, higher-pressure systems.
